description: GitHub Actions script injection via issue title allows arbitrary command execution when interpolated in run steps.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: GitHub Actions script injection via issue body allows arbitrary command execution in run steps.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: GitHub Actions script injection via pull request title enables command injection through PR metadata.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: GitHub Actions script injection via pull request body enables command injection through PR description.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: GitHub Actions script injection via comment body allows attackers to inject commands through issue or PR comments.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: GitHub Actions script injection via head_ref allows command injection through attacker-controlled branch names.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: GitHub Actions script injection via review body allows command injection through PR review content.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: GitHub Actions script injection via review comment body allows command injection through inline review comments.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: GitHub Actions script injection via pages source branch can be exploited if attacker controls branch naming.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: GitHub Actions script injection via discussion title enables command injection through user-created discussions.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: GitHub Actions script injection via discussion body enables command injection through user-created discussion content.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: Pull_request_target with checkout of PR head (pwn request) runs untrusted code with write permissions and secrets access.
fix_hint: Never checkout PR head in pull_request_target; use pull_request event or a separate workflow_run.

description: Pull_request_target with checkout using head_ref runs attacker code with elevated permissions.
fix_hint: Never checkout PR head in pull_request_target workflows.

description: Workflow grants write-all permissions giving excessive access to repository, packages, and deployments.
fix_hint: Use granular permissions with only the minimum required scopes.

description: Workflow grants contents:write permission allowing code modifications to the repository.
fix_hint: Only grant contents:write when the workflow must push commits or create releases.

description: Workflow grants packages:write permission allowing package publishing to GHCR or npm.
fix_hint: Restrict packages:write to deployment workflows only.

description: Workflow requests OIDC token write permission which can be used for cloud authentication.
fix_hint: Verify OIDC token is only used with trusted cloud providers and proper audience restrictions.

description: Workflow runs on self-hosted runner which persists state between jobs enabling cross-workflow attacks.
fix_hint: Use ephemeral runners or GitHub-hosted runners; if self-hosted is required, use isolated VMs.

description: GitHub Actions cache with static/predictable key is vulnerable to cache poisoning across branches.
fix_hint: Include hashFiles() or github.sha in cache keys to prevent cache poisoning.

description: GitHub Actions cache key does not include hashFiles or commit SHA making it vulnerable to poisoning.
fix_hint: Use hashFiles() in cache keys to tie caches to specific dependency versions.

description: Downloaded artifact used in execution without hash verification enabling artifact poisoning attacks.
fix_hint: Verify artifact checksums before executing downloaded content.

description: Secret value printed via echo which may expose it in workflow logs.
fix_hint: Never echo secrets; use them only as environment variables or input parameters.

description: Secret used in curl command which may expose it in process listings or logs.
fix_hint: Pass secrets via environment variables or files, not command-line arguments.

description: Third-party action pinned to mutable branch instead of commit SHA allowing supply chain attacks.
fix_hint: Pin actions to a full commit SHA (e.g., uses: actions/checkout@a5ac7e51b41094c92402da3b24376905380afc29).

description: Third-party action pinned to mutable tag instead of commit SHA; tags can be force-pushed.
fix_hint: Pin actions to a full commit SHA instead of version tags.

description: Third-party action pinned to latest tag which is highly mutable and dangerous.
fix_hint: Pin actions to a full commit SHA.

description: Workflow_dispatch input used directly in run step without sanitization enables command injection.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable and validate input before use.

description: GITHUB_TOKEN used with broad write permissions may allow repository modification in compromised workflows.
fix_hint: Restrict GITHUB_TOKEN to minimum required permissions.

description: Composite action interpolates inputs directly in shell commands enabling injection by callers.
fix_hint: Use environment variables instead of direct input interpolation in composite actions.

description: Reusable workflow called with secrets:inherit passes all secrets to the called workflow.
fix_hint: Explicitly pass only required secrets to reusable workflows.

description: GitHub Actions script injection via commit message allows command injection through push event data.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: GitHub Actions interpolation of sender login in run step can be exploited via crafted usernames.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: Run step directly interpolates github.event data which is attacker-controlled in most contexts.
fix_hint: Use environment variables to pass event data to scripts safely.

description: Direct access to OIDC token request token may enable cloud credential theft via federated identity.
fix_hint: Use official cloud provider actions for OIDC authentication instead of raw token access.

description: Workflow_run downloading and executing artifacts from triggering workflow enables cross-workflow poisoning.
fix_hint: Verify artifact integrity with checksums before executing.

description: Production environment referenced without protection rules may allow unauthorized deployments.
fix_hint: Configure environment protection rules with required reviewers in GitHub settings.

description: Step continues on error which may mask security scan failures or other critical checks.
fix_hint: Remove continue-on-error from security-critical steps.

description: Bash shell default with expression interpolation in run steps enables injection through event data.
fix_hint: Use environment variables for dynamic values in run steps.

description: GitHub Actions script injection via PR head label allows command injection through fork/branch naming.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: GitHub Actions script injection via PR head ref allows command injection through attacker-controlled branch names.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: GitLab CI uses privileged Docker mode on shared runners enabling container escape.
fix_hint: Avoid privileged mode; use kaniko or buildah for rootless container builds.

description: Docker-in-Docker service in GitLab CI grants full Docker access and can escape container isolation.
fix_hint: Use kaniko or buildah for building container images without Docker-in-Docker.

description: Registry credentials exposed in .gitlab-ci.yml configuration instead of protected CI variables.
fix_hint: Store registry credentials as masked, protected CI/CD variables.

description: GitLab CI includes remote config over plain HTTP enabling MITM pipeline injection.
fix_hint: Always use HTTPS for remote includes.

description: GitLab CI script uses CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE variable enabling command injection via crafted commit messages.
fix_hint: Quote variables and use them in non-shell contexts or validate before use.

description: GitLab CI script uses CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE variable enabling command injection via MR titles.
fix_hint: Never use CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE directly in scripts; sanitize or use in non-shell contexts.

description: GitLab CI script uses CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME which can contain attacker-controlled branch names.
fix_hint: Quote variables and validate branch names before use in scripts.

description: GitLab CI script uses CI_COMMIT_TITLE enabling command injection via crafted commit subjects.
fix_hint: Never interpolate CI_COMMIT_TITLE directly in shell scripts.

description: Security scan configured with allow_failure:true means vulnerabilities will not block the pipeline.
fix_hint: Remove allow_failure from security scans to enforce vulnerability gates.

description: GitLab CI artifacts without expire_in persist indefinitely wasting storage and potentially exposing data.
fix_hint: Add expire_in to artifacts to ensure automatic cleanup.

description: GitLab CI cache with static key can be poisoned by any branch that runs the pipeline.
fix_hint: Use $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG or file-hash-based keys with cache:key:files.

description: GitLab CI trigger pipeline passes variables that may originate from user input enabling injection.
fix_hint: Validate and sanitize all variables passed to triggered pipelines.

description: GitLab CI includes config from another project which may introduce untrusted pipeline logic.
fix_hint: Pin included project references to specific refs and verify trust.

description: GitLab CI script outputs or transmits CI job token or registry password.
fix_hint: Never echo or send CI tokens to external endpoints.

description: GitLab CI script uses CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION enabling command injection via MR descriptions.
fix_hint: Never interpolate CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION directly in shell scripts.

description: Manual deployment trigger without protected environment may allow unauthorized deployments.
fix_hint: Use protected environments with required approvals for deployment jobs.

description: Groovy sandbox escape pattern in Jenkinsfile enables arbitrary code execution on the Jenkins controller.
fix_hint: Use declarative pipeline syntax; avoid scripted pipeline or Groovy metaprogramming.

description: Jenkins credentials() helper in Jenkinsfile references credential IDs that must be properly scoped.
fix_hint: Use folder-scoped credentials with minimal permissions.

description: Jenkins sh step uses double-quoted string interpolation with parameters enabling command injection.
fix_hint: Use single-quoted strings in sh steps to prevent Groovy interpolation.

description: Jenkins sh step interpolates user-supplied parameters directly into shell commands.
fix_hint: Use single quotes and pass parameters via environment variables.

description: Jenkins load() executes untrusted Groovy script from URL or arbitrary path.
fix_hint: Only load scripts from the same trusted repository or shared library.

description: Credentials may be leaked via echo/sh within withCredentials block exposing secrets to logs.
fix_hint: Never echo or print variables inside withCredentials blocks.

description: Jenkins shared library loaded without version pin may be tampered upstream.
fix_hint: Pin shared libraries to specific versions or commit SHAs.

description: Groovy evaluate() or GroovyShell in Jenkins pipeline enables arbitrary code execution.
fix_hint: Avoid dynamic Groovy evaluation; use static pipeline steps.

description: Jenkins readFile/writeFile with user-controlled paths enables file read/write outside workspace.
fix_hint: Validate and sanitize file paths; restrict to workspace directory.

description: Direct Runtime.exec() in Jenkinsfile bypasses pipeline sandbox for arbitrary command execution.
fix_hint: Use declarative sh steps instead of Runtime.exec().

description: Groovy string.execute() in Jenkinsfile runs arbitrary OS commands.
fix_hint: Use pipeline sh steps instead of Groovy .execute().

description: Hardcoded credential in Jenkinsfile exposes secrets in source control.
fix_hint: Use Jenkins credential store and withCredentials() binding.

description: Jenkins pipeline makes HTTP request to external endpoint which may exfiltrate data.
fix_hint: Restrict outbound requests to known, trusted endpoints.

description: Groovy File operations in Jenkins pipeline bypass workspace sandbox for arbitrary file writes.
fix_hint: Use pipeline writeFile step instead of Groovy File API.

description: Jenkins bat step with parameter interpolation enables command injection on Windows agents.
fix_hint: Use single quotes or pass parameters via environment variables.

description: Archiving all files may include secrets, credentials, or sensitive build outputs.
fix_hint: Archive only specific file patterns needed for downstream consumption.

description: Groovy @Grab annotation downloads and executes arbitrary dependencies bypassing Jenkins plugin controls.
fix_hint: Use Jenkins plugins instead of @Grab for dependency management.

description: Jenkins powershell step with parameter interpolation enables command injection.
fix_hint: Use single quotes and pass parameters via environment variables.

description: CircleCI orb pinned to volatile version allowing upstream replacement attacks.
fix_hint: Pin orbs to specific versions (e.g., circleci/node@5.1.0).

description: CircleCI orb pinned to major version only allowing minor/patch changes by upstream.
fix_hint: Pin orbs to exact versions (e.g., circleci/node@5.1.0).

description: CircleCI context exposed to workflows triggered by forked PRs may leak secrets to untrusted contributors.
fix_hint: Restrict contexts to trusted branches; do not expose to forked PR builds.

description: SSH key fingerprint in CircleCI config may allow unauthorized access to deployment targets.
fix_hint: Use CircleCI contexts for SSH keys and restrict to deployment workflows.

description: CircleCI setup:true enables dynamic config generation which can be exploited for pipeline injection.
fix_hint: Validate dynamically generated config before continuation.

description: CircleCI run step uses parameter substitution that may contain user-controlled input.
fix_hint: Validate and sanitize parameters before use in shell commands.

description: CircleCI cache with static key can be poisoned across branches and PRs.
fix_hint: Include checksum or branch in cache keys.

description: CircleCI job pipes remote content to shell enabling RCE if upstream is compromised.
fix_hint: Download, verify checksum, then execute separately.

description: Hardcoded secret in CircleCI config exposes credentials in version control.
fix_hint: Use CircleCI contexts or project environment variables for secrets.

description: Deployment workflow without restricted context may allow unauthorized deployments.
fix_hint: Add restricted contexts with security group restrictions to deployment workflows.

description: Docker layer caching may serve poisoned layers if a previous build was compromised.
fix_hint: Regularly purge Docker layer cache and verify base image integrity.

description: CircleCI stores potentially sensitive files as build artifacts accessible via URL.
fix_hint: Only store non-sensitive build outputs as artifacts.

description: CircleCI machine executor has full VM access including Docker and network, increasing attack surface.
fix_hint: Use Docker executor where possible to limit execution environment.

description: Pipeline parameters used directly in run step may enable injection via API triggers.
fix_hint: Validate pipeline parameters before interpolation in shell commands.

description: Azure DevOps variable expansion in script step may be exploited via user-controlled pipeline variables.
fix_hint: Use macro syntax $(var) only for trusted variables; prefer env mapping for user inputs.

description: Azure DevOps service connection should have minimal scope to prevent lateral movement in Azure.
fix_hint: Use service connections scoped to specific resource groups.

description: Azure DevOps template extends may introduce untrusted pipeline logic from external repos.
fix_hint: Pin template references to specific branches or commits.

description: Azure DevOps checkout with persistCredentials:true leaves git credentials on disk for subsequent steps.
fix_hint: Set persistCredentials to false unless git push is required.

description: Azure DevOps resource trigger without branch filter accepts pipelines from any branch.
fix_hint: Add branch filters to resource triggers to restrict triggering sources.

description: Azure DevOps pipeline uses self-hosted agent pool which persists state between builds.
fix_hint: Use Microsoft-hosted agents or ephemeral self-hosted agents with clean environments.

description: Azure DevOps script step with macro variable expansion may be vulnerable to injection.
fix_hint: Use runtime expression syntax $[variables.var] for safer variable access.

description: Azure DevOps PowerShell step expands secrets via macro syntax potentially exposing them.
fix_hint: Map secrets as env variables and mark them issecret=true.

description: Hardcoded secret in Azure DevOps pipeline variables exposes credentials in version control.
fix_hint: Use Azure DevOps variable groups or Key Vault for secrets.

description: Production deployment stage without environment approval gate allows unauthorized deployments.
fix_hint: Use Azure DevOps environments with approval gates for production deployments.

description: Azure DevOps template parameters used in expressions may enable template injection attacks.
fix_hint: Validate parameter values and use type-safe parameter definitions.

description: Azure DevOps container job with --privileged flag grants full host access.
fix_hint: Remove --privileged flag; use minimal container capabilities.

description: Downloaded build artifacts executed in subsequent steps enables cross-pipeline poisoning.
fix_hint: Verify artifact checksums before executing downloaded content.

description: Variable group linked without pipeline-specific restrictions may expose secrets to unauthorized pipelines.
fix_hint: Restrict variable groups to specific pipelines in Azure DevOps settings.

description: Secret environment variable printed to CI logs exposing credentials.
fix_hint: Never echo secrets; use them only as masked environment variables.

description: Pipeline triggers on all branches without protection allowing execution from unreviewed code.
fix_hint: Restrict pipeline triggers to protected branches.

description: Deployment pipeline without approval gates allows automated pushes to production.
fix_hint: Add manual approval gates before production deployments.

description: Build artifacts published without signing or checksum verification enabling tampering.
fix_hint: Sign artifacts with cosign, GPG, or include SHA-256 checksums.

description: Piping remote content to shell in CI pipeline enables RCE if upstream is compromised.
fix_hint: Download file, verify its checksum, then execute separately.

description: Credentials embedded in URL in CI config expose them in logs and version control.
fix_hint: Use credential helpers or environment variables instead of embedding credentials in URLs.

description: Dumping all environment variables in CI may expose secrets in build logs.
fix_hint: Never dump env vars in CI; print only specific non-sensitive variables for debugging.

description: npm publish in CI pipeline without dry-run flag; ensure proper authentication and access controls.
fix_hint: Use npm publish with --provenance and ensure proper access token scoping.

description: pip install from non-PyPI index in CI creates dependency confusion attack vector.
fix_hint: Use --index-url pointing to official PyPI or a trusted private index.

description: Docker login with plaintext password in CI command exposes registry credentials.
fix_hint: Use docker login --password-stdin with secrets from CI variable store.

description: GitHub Actions interpolation of workflow_run head branch can be exploited via crafted branch names.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: CodeQL init without autobuild may miss compiled language analysis reducing security scan coverage.
fix_hint: Include codeql-action/autobuild or custom build steps for compiled languages.

description: Full git history fetched which may expose sensitive data from old commits and increases attack surface.
fix_hint: Use shallow clone (fetch-depth: 1) unless full history is required.

description: Secret value hardcoded in GitLab CI variables block instead of using CI/CD variable settings.
fix_hint: Store secrets as masked, protected CI/CD variables in GitLab settings.

description: GitLab CI uses :latest image tag which is mutable and may change unexpectedly.
fix_hint: Pin images to specific digest or immutable version tags.

description: GitLab Pages deploying public directory may expose internal documentation or sensitive content.
fix_hint: Review public directory contents and set GitLab Pages access control.

description: Jenkins withEnv sets secrets as plain environment variables instead of using credentials binding.
fix_hint: Use withCredentials() for secret management instead of withEnv.

description: Jenkins node label from user parameter could direct execution to attacker-controlled agent.
fix_hint: Use static node labels; never derive from user input.

description: Large CircleCI resource class may indicate compute-intensive or crypto-mining workloads.
fix_hint: Verify large resource classes are justified by actual build requirements.

description: Azure DevOps checkout with submodules may pull code from untrusted repositories.
fix_hint: Verify all submodule URLs point to trusted repositories.

description: Azure DevOps task pinned to major version 0 indicating preview/unstable task.
fix_hint: Use stable task versions (major version >= 1) in production pipelines.

description: Hardcoded npm token in CI config enables unauthorized package publishing.
fix_hint: Store npm tokens as encrypted CI/CD secrets, never in config files.

description: Concurrent workflows without cancellation may allow parallel deploys causing race conditions.
fix_hint: Set cancel-in-progress: true for deployment workflows.

description: Workflow has security-events write permission; verify only security scanning tools need this.
fix_hint: Grant security-events:write only to SARIF upload steps.

description: GitHub Actions interpolation of release name/body can be exploited if releases are created by untrusted actors.
fix_hint: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of direct interpolation.

description: ANSI color terminal output with user-controlled input may enable terminal escape injection.
fix_hint: Sanitize output shown in Jenkins console to prevent escape sequence injection.

description: Step with condition: always() runs even on failure/cancellation which may mask security issues.
fix_hint: Use succeeded() or custom conditions instead of always() for security-sensitive steps.

description: Job consumes artifacts from another job without integrity verification.
fix_hint: Verify artifact integrity with checksums when consuming cross-job artifacts.
